contactId.title: contactId
contactId.description: The Salesforce Contact ID of the customer. Set this to the value of EndUserContactId from the MessagingSession context, or the Contact Id from the current record context. If available, always pass this value. Do not ask the customer for this.

caseSubject.title: caseSubject
caseSubject.description: A brief subject line describing the customer's return reason, such as 'Defective Toast Go 3 - Screen Cracked' or 'Product Not Working - Requesting Replacement'. Extract from the customer's description of their issue.

issue.title: issue
issue.description: The customer's description of the problem with their product. This should capture what went wrong, how the product is failing, or why they need to return it. Extract the full issue description from user input.

productName.title: productName
productName.description: The name or model of the product the customer wants to return, such as 'Toast Go 3', 'Toast Flex', or the specific product model. Ask the customer if not provided.

serialNumber.title: serialNumber
serialNumber.description: The serial number of the product being returned. This is typically found on the product label or in the customer's order details. Ask the customer for this information.

reportedIssues.title: reportedIssues
reportedIssues.description: Specific symptoms or problems the customer has observed with the product, such as 'screen is cracked', 'device won't power on', 'overheating during use'. Extract from the customer's description.

stepstoproduce.title: stepstoproduce
stepstoproduce.description: Any troubleshooting steps the customer has already tried, such as 'restarted the device', 'factory reset', 'checked power cable'. Ask the customer what they have tried so far.

errormessage.title: errormessage
errormessage.description: Any error messages or error codes the customer has seen on the product. This could be on-screen errors, blinking light patterns, or audible alerts. Optional if no errors were displayed.

additionalNotes.title: additionalNotes
additionalNotes.description: Any additional details or context the customer wants to share about the return, such as special handling requests, preferred contact method, or timeline constraints.
